contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Draft strategic email reply to Buck's Spices retail prospect
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/96
  
  Details:
  Drafted in-thread Gmail reply to Beau at Buck's Spices in response to his post-warm-up engagement (paste use case + license question). Built one-off script (committed in go_to_market#96) that finds the thread by sender, pulls latest inbound message headers, builds a properly-threaded reply with In-Reply-To/References, embeds the Edgar tracking pixel, creates a Gmail draft (no send), and auto-replaces prior drafts on the same thread to support iteration. Strategic content iterated through five rounds with the operator: corrected wet/dry framing on cacao paste (solid at room temp, fits dry retail license, wet license only for processing), checked store-inventory.json so only in-stock SKUs were offered (Oscar Bahia + Santa Ana 2023 ceremonial cacaos + nibs; chocolate bars and Paulo dropped since OOS), reframed pre-grated form as a customer-experience benefit, included farm links to agroverse.shop, paste use cases included as decision-grade info, dropped in-person visit and shipped-sample offers per operator preference, closed with open Q&A door.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
